description: The Takumi-gumi is a Japanese yakuza syndicate based in the Kansai region, founded in 1967 by Masaru Takumi. It was originally part of the Yamaguchi-gumi, with Takumi serving as second-in-command. After Takumi's assassination in 1997, Tadashi Irie became the leader. The group withdrew from the Yamaguchi-gumi in 2015 to form the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi, and later left that group in 2022. By 2023, membership had dwindled to about 20 members.
